questions.question: permission_to_record
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask for permission to record the conversation audio?
questions.evidence: Throughout the conversation, the agent does not inform the customer that the call is being recorded.
questions.explanation: The agent did not ask for permission or inform the customer about recording the audio.

questions.question: vehicle_registration_verified
questions.criteria: Did the agent verify the correctness of the registered vehicle's license plate?
questions.evidence: 00:00:11.000 CUSTOMER: My car number is 4481. ... 00:00:18.000 AGENT: 4481 Toyota Yaris, Chonburi province, right? ... 00:00:21.000 CUSTOMER: Yes, yes.
questions.explanation: The agent verified the license plate number and province provided by the customer.

questions.question: ask_about_vehicle_damage
questions.criteria: Did the agent inquire about the damage to the insured vehicle (the conversation mentions the damage to the insured vehicle)?
questions.evidence: 00:01:33.000 AGENT: Which part of your car that was damaged? Back side, front side, or driver side?
questions.explanation: The agent asked specifically which part of the vehicle was damaged.

questions.question: verify_make_model
questions.criteria: Did the agent verify the correctness of the reported vehicle's brand/make?
questions.evidence: 00:00:16.000 CUSTOMER: Toyota Yaris. ... 00:00:18.000 AGENT: 4481 Toyota Yaris, Chonburi province, right?
questions.explanation: The agent repeated and confirmed the car brand and model with the customer.

questions.question: ask_date_time_of_incident
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask for the date and time of the incident? (If the incident occurred on the same day as the report, asking only for the time is acceptable, or if the conversation can specify the date and time of the incident.)
questions.evidence: 00:00:27.000 AGENT: Okay, so you got the accident today just now, right? ... 00:00:30.000 CUSTOMER: Yes, yes.
questions.explanation: The agent asked if the accident happened today, which is acceptable for immediate notification.

questions.question: ask_driver_name_contact
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask for the driver's name and phone number? (The conversation can specify the driver's name and number.)
questions.evidence: 00:00:32.000 AGENT: May I know who is the driver? ... 00:00:39.000 CUSTOMER: I am the driver, Sona Sharma. ... 00:00:48.000 AGENT: Your phone number to contact back at this phone number, right?
questions.explanation: The agent asked for the driver's name and confirmed the contact phone number.

questions.question: ask_incident_description
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask about the nature/characteristics of the incident? (The conversation mentions the nature of the incident.)
questions.evidence: 00:01:17.000 AGENT: How did the accident happen? ... 00:01:19.000 CUSTOMER: I was taking a turn towards the right... and a bike came and crashed in.
questions.explanation: The agent asked how the accident happened and the customer described the collision with a bike.

questions.question: surveyor_appointment_details_inquired
questions.criteria: Was the agent able to assign the job to the Surveyor correctly? (Check if the agent asked for the Appointment Place, Surveyor Appointed Date/time, or informed that they will coordinate for the staff to contact back.)
questions.evidence: 00:05:27.000 AGENT: It's gonna take time 30 or 40 minutes. You have to wait. ... 00:05:40.000 AGENT: I will send someone to assist you right now, ma'am.
questions.explanation: The agent informed the customer that a surveyor would be sent and provided an estimated time.

questions.question: ask_notifier_name_contact
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask for the caller's/notifier's name and number? (The conversation can specify the caller's name and number.)
questions.evidence: 00:00:23.000 AGENT: May I know the owner, please? ... 00:00:48.000 AGENT: Your phone number to contact back at this phone number, right?
questions.explanation: The agent confirmed the identity of the caller (who is the owner) and their contact number.

questions.question: ask_incident_location
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask for the location of the incident?
questions.evidence: 00:01:41.000 AGENT: Your location that you got the accident, please? ... 00:02:13.000 AGENT: Thai Strength Club Pattaya, right?
questions.explanation: The agent asked for the location and even talked to a third party to confirm the specific location details.

questions.question: agent_introduces_self
questions.criteria: Did the agent introduce themselves and the department? (Accident notification center followed by name, or name followed by accident notification center.)
questions.evidence: 00:00:03.000 AGENT: คอลเซ็นเตอร์ สวัสดีครับ (Call center, hello.)
questions.explanation: The agent identified the department as the Call Center but did not provide their name.

questions.question: ask_other_party_registration
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask for the other party's license plate? [In case of an incident with another party] (If there is no other party, the answer is None.)
questions.evidence: Throughout the conversation, the agent identifies that a motorcycle/scooter was involved but does not ask for its license plate.
questions.explanation: The agent did not ask for the other party's (motorcycle) license plate information.

questions.question: missed_call_callback
questions.criteria: In case of a dropped call, did the agent contact the customer back appropriately? (Answer is None only.)
questions.evidence: There is no dropped call in this transcript.
questions.explanation: Not applicable.

questions.question: recommend_vdo_survey
questions.criteria: Did the agent recommend the customer to do a VDO Survey?
questions.evidence: The agent informs the customer that a physical surveyor will be sent and does not mention VDO Survey.
questions.explanation: The agent did not offer or recommend the VDO Survey service.

questions.question: customer_complaint
questions.criteria: Were there any complaints from the customer? (Answer is None only.)
questions.evidence: The customer did not make any complaints regarding the service during the call.
questions.explanation: Not applicable.

questions.question: ask_car_driveable
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask and record if the car is drivable? (Car Is Driveable)
questions.evidence: 00:01:07.000 AGENT: Right now your car can drive or not drive? ... 00:01:10.000 CUSTOMER: Yes, yes, it can drive.
questions.explanation: The agent explicitly asked the customer if the vehicle was still drivable.

questions.question: ask_about_injuries
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask if anyone was injured from the incident?
questions.evidence: 00:01:12.000 AGENT: Any people got injury or not?
questions.explanation: The agent asked about potential injuries resulting from the accident.

questions.question: surveyor_info_recorded
questions.criteria: Was the surveying company's information recorded correctly? Was the surveyor's name and contact number recorded? (Answer is None only.)
questions.evidence: This is internal processing information and is not part of the external dialogue.
questions.explanation: Not applicable.

questions.question: agent_tone_and_language
questions.criteria: Did the agent use an appropriate tone of voice and words? (Describe the characteristics of the agent's tone of voice in detail.)
questions.evidence: The agent maintains a professional and helpful tone, adapting to the customer's language and assisting them by speaking to a bystander to confirm the location.
questions.explanation: The agent was professional, polite, and tried their best to overcome the communication barrier regarding the location.

questions.question: agent_listens_without_interruption
questions.criteria: Did the agent listen to the customer and not interrupt the conversation?
questions.evidence: The transcript shows the agent waiting for the customer's responses and asking clarifying questions without cutting them off.
questions.explanation: The agent listened effectively and allowed the customer to finish their sentences.

questions.question: agent_appropriate_interaction
questions.criteria: Did the agent have appropriate interaction with the customer during the conversation?
questions.evidence: The agent interacted appropriately, especially by asking to speak with a Thai person to ensure the location accuracy for the customer's benefit.
questions.explanation: The agent's interactions were relevant, helpful, and professional.

questions.question: agent_eager_to_help_empathetic
questions.criteria: Was the agent enthusiastic about helping and empathetic towards the customer?
questions.evidence: 00:05:40.000 AGENT: I will send someone to assist you right now, ma'am. ... 00:05:46.000 AGENT: Sure.
questions.explanation: The agent showed willingness to help by quickly coordinating assistance and reassuring the customer.

questions.question: agent_emotion_control
questions.criteria: Did the agent control their emotions appropriately during the conversation?
questions.evidence: Despite potential language confusion regarding the location, the agent remained calm and professional throughout the call.
questions.explanation: The agent maintained emotional control and stayed focused on solving the customer's problem.

questions.question: agent_appropriate_hold
questions.criteria: Did the agent put the call on hold appropriately? (If there was no holding, the answer is None.)
questions.evidence: There was no official hold placed on the call.
questions.explanation: Not applicable.

questions.question: accurate_complete_advice
questions.criteria: Did the agent provide advice and answer the customer's questions and objections accurately and completely? (Answer is None only.)
questions.evidence: This is a qualitative requirement for the 'answer is None only' instruction.
questions.explanation: Not applicable.

questions.question: agent_impressive_closing
questions.criteria: Did the agent end the conversation with an impressive sentence for the customer? Example sentences...
questions.evidence: 00:05:40.000 AGENT: I will send someone to assist you right now, ma'am. ... 00:05:46.000 AGENT: Sure.
questions.explanation: The agent ended the call with 'Sure' after the customer said 'as soon as possible', without using any of the recommended polite closing phrases.

questions.question: call_type
questions.criteria: Call Type (If the agent starts the sentence by introducing that they are contacting from Roojai, it is Outbound. If not, it is Inbound.)
questions.evidence: 00:00:03.000 AGENT: คอลเซ็นเตอร์ สวัสดีครับ (Call center, hello.)
questions.explanation: The agent answered an incoming call, characterizing it as an inbound call.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: คอลเซ็นเตอร์ สวัสดีครับ

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Hello, I have an insurance with Roojai.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: My car number is 4481.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: 4481. One moment please, ma'am.

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Toyota Yaris.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: 4481 Toyota Yaris, Chonburi province, right?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Yes, yes.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: May I know the owner, please?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Sona Sharma.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Okay, so you got the accident today just now, right?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Yes, yes.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Could you please give me more information to put your information on the system, please? May I know who is the driver?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: I am the driver, Sona Sharma.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Okay, so right now I talk to Mrs. Sona, right?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Yes, yes, you're talking to the owner.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Your phone number to contact back at this phone number, right?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Sorry?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Your phone number to contact back at this phone number, right?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: So right now your car can drive or not drive?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Sorry?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Right now your car can drive or not drive?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Yes, yes, it can drive.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Any people got injury or not?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: It is hit on the driver's door.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: How did the accident happen?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: I was taking a turn towards the right after dropping my daughter to the gym and a bike came and crashed in.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: The motorcycle hit you, right?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Sorry?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: The motorbike hit you, right?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Yes, yes, a scooter actually.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Which part of your car that was damaged? Back side, front side, or driver side?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: The driver side, driver side door.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Your location that you got the accident, please?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Location is, this is, how do I tell you the location? This is Thai Strength.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Did you have the Thai people around you? Can I talk with them? Because I would like to confirm the location.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thai Strength Club Pattaya, right?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Yeah, yeah, Thai Strength Club Pattaya.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Excuse me, did you have the Thai people around you to confirm the location?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Can I talk with the Thai people around you?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Can I leave or do I have to stay?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: No, you have to wait.

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: I have to stay there? Okay, just a moment.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: If the Thai people around you, can I talk with them? Because I would like to confirm.

transcript.speaker: Speaker ?
transcript.text: ฮัลโหลครับ

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: สวัสดีครับคุณพี่ผู้ชาย ผมเป็นประกันนะ อันนี้รถเกิดเหตุที่ไหนครับพี่?

transcript.speaker: Speaker ?
transcript.text: อ๋อ เกิดตรงนี้ ตรงก่อนถึงอ่างมาบประชันน่ะ กำจัดปลวกเนี่ย ใต้สะพานน่ะ ก่อนถึงอ่างนะ ก่อนถึงพาวเวอร์แลนด์น่ะ

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: พาวเวอร์แลนด์เหรอครับพี่?

transcript.speaker: Speaker ?
transcript.text: เออ พาวเวอร์แลนด์ ก่อนถึงพาวเวอร์แลนด์น่ะ ที่เข้ามามาตรงบิดกมล สี่แยกบิดกมล แล้วลูกก็มาที่อ่างมาบประชันนะ

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: สี่แยกเลยนะ บิดกมลใช่ไหม?

transcript.speaker: Speaker ?
transcript.text: เออ สี่แยกมอญ แล้วก็เลยมา เลยเข้ามาในอ่างมาบประชันเนี่ย กำจัดปลวก มันมียิมอยู่ตรงนี้ ไทยสปริงคลับ

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: ชื่อยิมอะไรจ๊ะพี่? ชื่อยิมอะไร?

transcript.speaker: Speaker ?
transcript.text: อ๋อ ยิมไทยสปริงคลับ

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: ไทยสปริงคลับ พัทยา ใช่ไหม?

transcript.speaker: Speaker ?
transcript.text: ใช่ๆ อยู่ในอ่างมาบประชันนี่แหละ

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: ไทยสปริงคลับ อ่างมาบประชัน สักครู่นะครับคุณพี่

transcript.speaker: Speaker ?
transcript.text: เออ ใช่ๆ ถูกต้องอยู่

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: แต่อยู่แถวๆ อ่างมาบประชันเนาะพี่เนาะ ใกล้ๆ

transcript.speaker: Speaker ?
transcript.text: เออ ก่อนถึงอ่างน้อง ก่อนถึงอ่างมาบประชันครับ

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: ได้ครับ สวนสาธารณะอ่างมาบประชันเนาะ หนูแจ้งพิกัดไปที่นี่ดีกว่า

transcript.speaker: Speaker ?
transcript.text: ใช่ๆ เพราะมันจะอยู่ใต้สะพานลอยเข้ามาน่ะ ก่อนถึงกำจัดปลวก

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: ได้ครับพี่ กำจัดปลวก อ่างมาบประชันใช่ไหม?

transcript.speaker: Speaker ?
transcript.text: เออๆ มันติดกับกำจัดปลวกอะ บริษัทกำจัดปลวกอะ อยู่ใต้เขื่อน อ่า ก่อนเข้าอ่างมาบประชัน มันจะอยู่ใต้สะพานทางด่วนน่ะ ไปทางขอบอ่างน่ะ เออ อยู่นี่แหละ ยิมที่อยู่ตรงนี้

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: สักครู่นะครับ

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: อ๋อ โอเค ได้ครับพี่ เดี๋ยวหนูแจ้งพิกัดไปที่อ่างมาบประชันก่อนดีกว่าเนาะ เพราะว่าน่าจะง่าย แล้วเดี๋ยวให้พี่เซอร์เวย์โทรหาลูกค้าอีกที

transcript.speaker: Speaker ?
transcript.text: โอเค ได้ครับ

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: ครับ ขอบคุณครับพี่ สวัสดีครับ

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: He is coming?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: It's gonna take time 30 or 40 minutes. You have to wait.

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Okay, so I have to wait here?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Yeah, you have to wait to see our surveyor.

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Okay, bye-bye.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I will send someone to assist you right now, ma'am.

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Yeah, please, as soon as possible.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Sure.
